description: User completed the signup form and account was created
User successfully signed in via the login page
User initiated logout and session was ended
User submitted their first message to begin creating a new skill

properties.prompt_length: number - character count of the initial prompt

description: User clicked on a skill card to view its details

properties.skill_name: string - display name of the skill
properties.skill_domain: string - domain category of the skill

description: User performed a search in the skill library
User filtered skills by domain category

properties.domain: string - the selected domain filter value

description: A new skill was successfully created via the mutation

properties.skill_id: string - the new skill's unique identifier
properties.skill_name: string - display name of the skill
properties.skill_domain: string - domain category of the skill

description: A skill was successfully deleted via the mutation
Chat conversation was auto-saved when starting a new session

properties.message_count: number - number of messages in the saved conversation

description: User upgraded from one plan tier to another (e.g., Free to Pro)

properties.previous_plan: string - the plan tier before upgrade (free|pro|enterprise)
properties.new_plan: string - the plan tier after upgrade (free|pro|enterprise)

description: User downgraded from a higher plan tier to a lower one

properties.previous_plan: string - the plan tier before downgrade (free|pro|enterprise)
properties.new_plan: string - the plan tier after downgrade (free|pro|enterprise)

description: User clicked to contact sales for Enterprise plan

properties.current_plan: string - the user's current plan tier when inquiring

description: User connected an external integration (GitHub, Slack, etc.)

properties.integration_id: string - the integration identifier (github, slack, jira, etc.)
properties.integration_name: string - display name of the integration

description: User disconnected an external integration

properties.integration_name: string - display name of the integration

description: User opened the command palette via keyboard shortcut

properties.trigger: string - how the palette was opened (keyboard_shortcut)

description: User selected an action from the command palette

properties.action_value: string - the specific action or navigation target

description: User resolved a human-in-the-loop checkpoint during skill creation

properties.resolution_type: string - how the checkpoint was resolved (approve|reject|modify)

description: User toggled between dark and light mode

properties.new_theme: string - the active theme after toggle (light|dark)

description: User opened the settings dialog from user menu

properties.source: string - where the settings was opened from (user_menu|command_palette)
